high_level_description: A vertical end-card with a twilight sky gradient from deep navy to warm gold at the horizon, the words ONE CONCEPT EVERY WEEK in elegant type, and a sky-blue FOLLOW button.

style_description.lighting: soft twilight glow rising from the bottom edge, stars fading in toward the top
style_description.medium: flat vector graphic design, clean geometric
style_description.art_style: channel end-card poster, generous negative space

compositional_deconstruction.background: Vertical twilight gradient: deep navy with faint stars at the top blending into a warm golden glow at the bottom horizon, a few thin dark cloud silhouettes.

elements.desc: A minimal line-art icon of a small sun half-hidden behind a cloud, drawn in thin gold and white strokes, centered above the headline.
Wide bold sans-serif, all caps, letterspaced, crisp white, centered.
Wide bold sans-serif, all caps, letterspaced, warm gold, centered directly below the first line.
Bold sans-serif capitals in deep navy, centered inside a rounded rectangular sky-blue button with a soft glow.
